    • enterKID

      public boolean enterKID(UnaryExpression expr)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Enters a KID node.
      Specified by:
      enterKID in interface IVisitor
      Overrides:
      enterKID in class DefaultVisitor
      Parameters:
      expr - the node which is entered
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the children of the given node, true to continue visiting.
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)
